zh.Woore, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾武爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Wilbraham於大約1415年出生在英國爾武德利時，她的父親Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey25歲，母親Margaret Golborne27歲。她和Hugh de Bulkleley至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1470年在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Woore, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾武爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Wilbraham于大约1415年出生在英国爾武德利时，她的父亲Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey25岁，母亲Margaret Golborne27岁。她和Hugh de Bulkleley至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1470年在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilbraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Wilbraham (Cambridgeshire). The placename derives from the Old English female personal name Wilburg + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Wilbraham was born about 1415, in Woodley, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Golborne, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Hugh de Bulkleley. She died about 1470, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Wilbraham est née environ 1415, à Woodley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Golborne, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Hugh de Bulkleley. Elle est décédée environ 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Wilbraham um 1415 in Woodley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Golborne 27. Sie hatte mit Hugh de Bulkleley mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1470 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Wilbraham è nata il circa 1415 nel Woodley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Golborne, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Hugh de Bulkleley. Morì circa 1470, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Wilbrahamが約1415年にイギリスチェシュアイアウッドリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodheyは25歳，母Margaret Golborneは27歳であった。彼女はHugh de Bulkleleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1470年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Wilbraham(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 체실르 우들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Golborne(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Hugh de Bulkleley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Wilbraham nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Woodley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Golborne, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Hugh de Bulkleley. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1470, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Wilbraham родилась около 1415 г. в местности вудли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Golborne, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Hugh de Bulkleley. Она умерла около 1470 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Wilbraham nació aproximadamente 1415, en Woodley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Golborne, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Hugh de Bulkleley. Murió aproximadamente 1470, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
